briefdescription.para: Convert assigned numbers frequency to frequency value.

parameterdescription.para: The assigned numbers frequency to convert.
The converted frequency value in Hz.

briefdescription.para: Convert frequency value to assigned numbers frequency.
Extract the frequency from a codec configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to extract data from.
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the frequency of a codec configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to set data for.
The assigned numbers frequency to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Convert assigned numbers frame duration to duration in microseconds.

parameterdescription.para: The assigned numbers frame duration to convert.
The converted frame duration value in microseconds.

briefdescription.para: Convert frame duration in microseconds to assigned numbers frame duration.

parameterdescription.para: The frame duration in microseconds to convert.

briefdescription.para: Extract frame duration from BT codec config.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to extract data from.
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the frame duration of a codec configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to set data for.
The assigned numbers frame duration to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct bt_audio_codec_cfg *codec_cfg, enum bt_audio_location *chan_allocation, bool fallback_to_default)
memberdef.name: bt_audio_codec_cfg_get_chan_allocation

briefdescription.para: Extract channel allocation from BT codec config.

detaileddescription.para: The value returned is a bit field representing one or more audio locations as specified by bt_audio_location Shall match one or more of the bits set in BT_PAC_SNK_LOC/BT_PAC_SRC_LOC.
Up to the configured BT_AUDIO_CODEC_CAP_TYPE_CHAN_COUNT number of channels can be present.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to extract data from.
Pointer to the variable to store the extracted value in.
If true this function will provide the default value of BT_AUDIO_LOCATION_MONO_AUDIO if the type is not found when codec_cfg.id is BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_LC3.
Value is found and stored in the pointer provided
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the channel allocation of a codec configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to set data for.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract frame size in octets from BT codec config.

detaileddescription.para: The overall SDU size will be octets_per_frame * blocks_per_sdu.

The Bluetooth specifications are not clear about this value - it does not state that the codec shall use this SDU size only. A codec like LC3 supports variable bit-rate (per SDU) hence it might be allowed for an encoder to reduce the frame size below this value. Hence it is recommended to use the received SDU size and divide by blocks_per_sdu rather than relying on this octets_per_sdu value to be fixed.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to extract data from.
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the octets per codec frame of a codec configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to set data for.
The octets per codec frame to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Extract number of audio frame blocks in each SDU from BT codec config.

detaileddescription.para: The overall SDU size will be octets_per_frame * frame_blocks_per_sdu * number-of-channels.
If this value is not present a default value of 1 shall be used.

A frame block is one or more frames that represents data for the same period of time but for different channels. If the stream have two audio channels and this value is two there will be four frames in the SDU.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to extract data from.
If true this function will return the default value of 1 if the type is not found when codec_cfg.id is BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_LC3.
The count of codec frame blocks in each SDU.
The found value has invalid size or value

briefdescription.para: Set the frame blocks per SDU of a codec configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to set data for.
The frame blocks per SDU to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct bt_audio_codec_cfg *codec_cfg, enum bt_audio_codec_cfg_type type, const uint8_t **data)
memberdef.name: bt_audio_codec_cfg_get_val

briefdescription.para: Lookup a specific codec configuration value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The type id to look for
Pointer to the data-pointer to update when item is found

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_audio_codec_cfg *codec_cfg, enum bt_audio_codec_cfg_type type, const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len)
memberdef.name: bt_audio_codec_cfg_set_val

briefdescription.para: Set or add a specific codec configuration value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to set the value in.
Pointer to the data-pointer to set
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Unset a specific codec configuration value.

detaileddescription.para: The type and the value will be removed from the codec configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to set the value in.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct bt_audio_codec_cfg *codec_cfg, uint8_t type, const uint8_t **data)

briefdescription.para: Lookup a specific metadata value based on type.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
The type id to look for
Pointer to the data-pointer to update when item is found

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_audio_codec_cfg *codec_cfg, enum bt_audio_metadata_type type, const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len)

briefdescription.para: Set or add a specific codec configuration metadata value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec configuration to set the value in.
Pointer to the data-pointer to set.
The new value could not be set or added due to lack of memory

briefdescription.para: Unset a specific codec configuration metadata value.

detaileddescription.para: The type and the value will be removed from the codec configuration metadata.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to set the value in.

briefdescription.para: Extract preferred contexts.

detaileddescription.para: See BT_AUDIO_METADATA_TYPE_PREF_CONTEXT for more information about this value.

parameterdescription.para: The codec data to search in.
If true this function will provide the default value of BT_AUDIO_CONTEXT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED if the type is not found when codec_cfg.id is BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_LC3.
The preferred context type if positive or 0
The found value has invalid size

briefdescription.para: Audio codec Config APIs.

detaileddescription.para: Functions to parse codec config data when formatted as LTV wrapped into Codec config parsing APIs.
